checks.output:
usage: contractor_collect_procurement_ocds.py [-h]
                                              [--storage-root STORAGE_ROOT]
                                              [--sources SOURCES]
                                              [--published-from PUBLISHED_FROM]
                                              [--published-to PUBLISHED_TO]
                                              [--updated-from UPDATED_FROM]
                                              [--updated-to UPDATED_TO]
                                              [--stages STAGES]
                                              [--limit LIMIT]
                                              [--ons-lookup-file ONS_LOOKUP_FILE]
                                              [--ons-lookup-url ONS_LOOKUP_URL]

Collect official UK procurement OCDS snapshots for contractor intelligence.

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --storage-root STORAGE_ROOT
  --sources SOURCES     Comma-separated:
                        contracts_finder,find_tender,ons_lookup
  --published-from PUBLISHED_FROM
                        Contracts Finder start datetime/date. Default: UTC now
                        minus 14 days.
  --published-to PUBLISHED_TO
                        Contracts Finder end datetime/date. Default: UTC now.
  --updated-from UPDATED_FROM
                        Find a Tender start datetime/date. Default: UTC now
                        minus 14 days.
  --updated-to UPDATED_TO
                        Find a Tender end datetime/date. Default: UTC now.
  --stages STAGES       Contracts Finder stages filter, e.g. award or tender.
                        Leave unset for API default.
  --limit LIMIT
  --ons-lookup-file ONS_LOOKUP_FILE
                        Local ONS NSPL/ONSPD/lookup CSV or ZIP already
                        obtained legally from ONS/Open Geography.
  --ons-lookup-url ONS_LOOKUP_URL
                        Official ons.gov.uk or geoportal.statistics.gov.uk URL
                        to download. Leave unset if not verified.
checks.name: procurement_help
